c74object.name: dk.sinusoidplayer~
c74object.digest: Oscillator bank for the playback of sinusoidal analysis
c74object.description: The dk.sinusoidplayer~ object is an oscillator bank for the playback of analyzed sinusoidal components. Allows for random variation in envelope parameters so each individual oscillator has its own unique decay.
c74object.discussion:
If you want to learn more about the underlying algorithms have a look at these articles:
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/loudness
https://learn.flucoma.org/reference/sines

inlet.digest: Frequency/gain pairs from dk.sineframe or dk.sines~
inlet.description: Frequency/gain pairs from dk.sineframe or dk.sines~.

outlet.digest: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values
outlet.description: Dump out for parameter names, ranges, and values.

method.name: dump
method.digest: Dump parameter names, ranges, and values
method.description: Dumps parameter names, ranges, and values out of the right-most outlet.

method.name: randomize
method.description: Randomize parameters defined by the preset dictionary. An additional optional argument will randomize by a certain percentage.

attribute.name: brightness
attribute.digest: Amount of waveshapping added to each individual voice
attribute.description: Amount of waveshapping added to each individual voice.

attribute.name: duration
attribute.description: Duration of each sinusoidal component (in ms).

attribute.name: maxvoices
attribute.digest: Total amount of voices that can sustain at a time
attribute.description: Total amount of voices that can sustain at a time. Can be useful for saving CPU.

attribute.name: shape
attribute.digest: Curve that is applied to the ramp up and ramp down
attribute.description: Curve that is applied to the ramp up and ramp down.

attribute.name: slope
attribute.digest: Ratio bewteen ramp up and ramp down
attribute.description: Whether the ramp up or ramp down time is longer as part of the overall duration.

attribute.name: transpose
attribute.description: Transposition of the sinusoidal analysis (in half steps).

attribute.name: voices
attribute.digest: Amount of sinusoidal components to resynthesize
attribute.description: Amount of sinusoidal components to resynthesize.

attribute.name: width
attribute.digest: Width of the stereo spread of the resynthesis
attribute.description: Width of the stereo spread of the resynthesis.
